title: BOOK REVIEW: '5 Steps to finding a university that suits you'
author: Nainani, Himanshu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Kavita Parikh and Anuj Parikh, associated with a leading international education consultancy in India for nearly two decades, have co-authored this excellent and timely book, "5 Steps to Finding a university that suits you". It is a well-researched book and brings the reader to speed on most issues around finding the right university overseas. Moreover, the book is timely since hundreds of thousands of students from India aspire to pursue an international education, especially in the United States of America and Canada. First, however, we must clarify that the book contains relevant information and a handy guide for students pursuing education in other international destinations.
